title: 10 NFL scouts predict the first 10 draft picks: Intriguing landing spots for top prospects
content: We asked NFL scouts to make draft picks for other teams, assigning one to each top-10 slot. Which prospects could go early?

title: Latest draft buzz: Downs' range, Day 2 steals, DT class, more
content: When could Caleb Downs and Jordyn Tyson be drafted? What are the Eagles, Giants and Steelers thinking?

title: Sources: Collier back to Lynx on supermax deal
content: Napheesa Collier has signed a one-year, $1.4 million supermax contract to return to the Lynx, sources told ESPN.

title: McDavid seals 6th scoring title with 4-assist finale
content: The Oilers' Connor McDavid won his sixth Art Ross title as the NHL scoring leader, finishing the regular season with 138 points after a four-assist performance in a 6-1 win over the Canucks.

title: Messick loses no-hit bid in 9th; Guardians hold on
content: Guardians rookie Parker Messick's bid for MLB's first no-hitter of 2026 was broken up in the ninth inning, but Cleveland held on for a 4-2 win over the Orioles on Thursday night.

title: Trout's latest blast caps 5-homer series in Bronx
content: Mike Trout homered for the fifth time during a four-game series at Yankee Stadium by crushing a 446-foot drive in the seventh inning.

title: Devils turn to Panthers executive Mehta as GM
content: The Devils have hired Sunny Mehta, who was an assistant GM when the Panthers won the Stanley Cup the past two years, as their general manager.

title: WR Knox found negligent in crash, to pay $2.8M
content: A Texas court on Wednesday issued a default judgment of more than $2.8 million against Theodore Knox, the co-defendant in one of the civil lawsuits against Chiefs receiver Rashee Rice stemming from a 2024 street racing crash in Dallas.

title: OU's Torrez stuns by taking NCAA all-around title
content: Oklahoma's Faith Torrez made her all-around season debut Thursday night and defeated Olympic and world champions to claim NCAA gymnastics' highest individual honor.

title: Sources: NWSL expected to vote on calendar shift
content: The NWSL's board of governors is expected to vote later this month on whether to flip the league's calendar to a fall-to-spring season, multiple sources told ESPN.

title: 👀 Inside the making of Mariners' Ichiro statue
content: You know about the reveal mishap. Here's what went into creating the sculpture that will forever honor a Seattle icon.

title: Stanley Cup playoffs mega-preview: Stanley Cup cases, X factors, bold predictions for all 16 teams
content: The postseason Thunderdome is about to open its gate. Which team will emerge as the 2026 Stanley Cup champion?

title: Stanley Cup contender flaws: Biggest issues for the NHL's top playoff teams
content: No NHL team is perfect, and postseason opponents will be certain to key in on these areas of weakness.

title: MLB Power Rankings: NL teams dominate top 10 with two debuts
content: Three weeks into the season, two red-hot NL teams are shooting up our list while another powerhouse plummets.

title: WrestleMania 42 roundtable: Most anticipated matches, bold predictions
content: Before we get to a weekend full of wrestling, our crew shares their thoughts on WrestleMania 42 in Las Vegas.

title: Forget the 40: The true measure of Carnell Tate
content: Wide receiver Carnell Tate is confident, intelligent and ready to star in the NFL. His mother made sure of it.

title: NBA awards 2026: Bontemps' ballot for MVP, top rookie, every honor
content: Which award battles are too close to call? Tim Bontemps unveils his official ballot for MVP, All-NBA, Sixth Man and every major honor.

title: Slams, blocks and game winners: Top 10 plays from Wemby's record-setting season
content: Wembanyama has made his case for MVP, DPOY and All-NBA. Here are the top 10 plays that highlight his season.

title: Spring football games: Previewing Virginia Tech, Michigan, Miami and others
content: Spring football games are in full swing this weekend. Here's what to know ahead of Friday and Saturday.

title: USMNT needs ambitious post-World Cup succession plan
content: Mauricio Pochettino won't coach the USMNT forever, and when he does leave, will U.S. Soccer be able to bring in another big-name boss to replace him?

title: Out with the old, in with the new: Ravens unveil new uniforms
content: The Ravens revamped their on-field look since 1999 with new uniforms after a process that took three years.

title: Biggest haters funeral: Chris Paul pokes fun at Clippers after play-in tournament loss
content: The LA Clippers saw their season end Wednesday, and an ex-Clipper made sure to rub salt in the wound.

title: LIV Golf is still going, but its days seem numbered and probably always were
content: LIV made a lot of noise, caused some nervous days at the PGA Tour and even forced some positive changes. But ultimately, it never did enough to make a real challenge.

title: Updated 2026 MLB draft rankings: Top 85 prospects and a 13-pick mock draft
content: The top of the 2026 MLB draft is coming into focus. Here's who your team could be targeting this summer.

title: 10 NFL draft prospects to put on your fantasy radar -- and three others to monitor
content: With the NFL draft nearly upon us, it's time to think about how the top prospects will fare in fantasy.

title: Mason Miller tops all pitchers? CJ Abrams goes 30-100-30? Don't be surprised
content: Eric Karabell looks into the crystal ball to tell fantasy baseball managers what might come to pass in the not-too-distant future.

title: Ranked: Who are the top 50 players in the Premier League right now?
content: The Premier League Top 50 returns, with just over a month remaining in the 2025-26 season, to rank the best players in the Premier League so far.

title: Weekend predictions: Can Arsenal hold off Man City? Will Atlético win Copa del Rey?
content: We've got potential title deciders in England and Germany, a grudge match in Portugal, and the Copa del Rey final: Julien Laurens previews the weekend and makes his predictions.

title: Alycia Baumgardner's journey to become the face of women's boxing
content: An early setback and a positive test -- since cleared -- didn't define Baumgardner. Now, she's on the doorstep of leading the sport.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Liverpool, Bayern eye Tottenham's Archie Gray
content: Tottenham Hotspur midfielder Archie Gray is being considered for a summer move by Bayern Munich and Liverpool. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: 'Centre trying to bypass OBCs and Dalits’: What Rahul Gandhi said on Delimitation Bill - Top quotes
content: Rahul Gandhi attacked the Women's Reservation Bill, calling it a political maneuver to alter India's electoral map rather than empower women. He alleged the government aims to weaken the political voice of OBCs and Dalits through constituency restructuring, vowing opposition to this "anti-national" move.

title: IPL 2026: RR manager Romi Bhinder 'warned and fined' for using phone in dugout
content: Rajasthan Royals manager Romi Bhinder has been let off with just a fine and warning for using mobile phone in the dugout. It can be confirmed that the BCCI ACSU decision has been communicated to the franchise.

title: Microsoft’s & Apple’s coding tools will be ‘dead soon,': Creator of Antrophic's AI coding tool
content: Boris Cherny, creator of Claude Code, predicts traditional coding tools like VS Code and Xcode will soon be obsolete. He believes AI agents will soon handle entire development workflows, rendering current IDEs unnecessary. This shift will redefine software engineers into 'builders' who orchestrate AI, requiring adaptability and early experimentation from professionals.

title: Congress MLA Vinay Kulkarni, 16 others gets life imprisonment in 2016 BJP worker murder case
content: A Special Court has sentenced Congress MLA Vinay Kulkarni and 16 others to life imprisonment for the 2016 murder of BJP leader Yogeshgouda Goudar. The court found them guilty of murder and criminal conspiracy. This conviction leads to Kulkarni's immediate disqualification from the Karnataka Legislative Assembly.

title: Jharkhand JAC Class 9 result 2026 released: Direct link to download scorecards
content: The Jharkhand Academic Council has declared the JAC Class 9 result 2026, with an overall pass percentage of 99.17%. Over 4.06 lakh students cleared the exam, with girls slightly outperforming boys. Most districts recorded above 98% results, reflecting strong performance. Students can check scores online or via SMS using their roll details.

title: 'Dhurandhar 2' BO day 30: Ranveer Singh film eyes 'Pushpa 2's collection
content: Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge, directed by Aditya Dhar and starring Ranveer Singh, Sanjay Dutt, Arjun Rampal, R. Madhavan, Rakesh Bedi, and Sara Arjun, has made box office history by crossing Rs. 1,100 crore in India net collections, the first Hindi film ever to achieve this milestone. On Day 30, the film's cumulative India net stands at Rs. 1,103.51 crore, with a worldwide gross of Rs. 1,737.74 crore across 4,64,059 shows globally. Week 1 delivered a record Rs. 674.17 crore, including a Rs. 90 crore opening day, the biggest in Hindi film history. Stay updated with live Day 30 tracking, all weekly breakdowns, and the complete story of the film that rewrote Hindi cinema's box office rulebook.

title: Nashik TCS case: Absconding female accused to file for anticipatory bail, cites pregnancy
content: Accused in the TCS Nashik case are moving court for bail. Lawyers are preparing applications for both arrested and absconding individuals. One accused seeks anticipatory bail citing pregnancy. Her lawyer states the FIR does not mention forced religious conversion but hurting religious sentiments. Police investigations are ongoing with multiple FIRs filed.

title: Watch: How is the US Navy enforcing blockade amid Hormuz deadlock
content: US Navy forces, aboard the USS Michael Murphy, diverted a merchant vessel in the Gulf of Oman to enforce restrictions on Iran's maritime routes. This operation, involving over 10,000 personnel and multiple naval assets, aims to sustain maritime enforcement in regional waters.

title: Father of AI Yann LeCun: EU politics is very different from US politics
content: AI pioneer Yann LeCun highlighted significant differences between European and American politics, particularly concerning privacy and government trust. He argued that the EU's strong privacy laws, unlike those in the US, protect citizens from both corporate and governmental intrusion. LeCun also suggested Europeans generally exhibit higher trust in their governments and expect more robust protections.

title: 'Since no one is complementing ... ': Shreyas Iyer's cheeky take after breathtaking Hardik Pandya catch - WATCH
content: Shreyas Iyer's spectacular mid-air relay catch wowed fans and drew viral reactions from teammates. Despite a strong century from Quinton de Kock, Iyer and Prabhsimran Singh's consecutive half-centuries powered Punjab Kings to a seven-wicket victory over Mumbai Indians, propelling PBKS to the top of the table.

title: Rupee hits one-week high as RBI moves to stem in fall
content: The Indian rupee surged to a one-week high Friday, boosted by Reserve Bank of India's strategic moves to curb dollar demand from state-run oil refiners. By urging them to use a special credit line, the central bank aims to stabilize the currency against global pressures.

title: Former Chicago Bears wide receiver Alshon Jeffery booked in jail for insurance fraud
content: Former Chicago Bears and Philadelphia Eagles star wide receiver Alshon Jeffery was recently arrested for insurance fraud, for allegedly hiding financial information. The Super Bowl champion, who played nine NFL seasons, was booked in jail and later released. California law defines insurance fraud as a felony, potentially carrying five years in prison and/or fine. Details of the alleged fraud remain scarce. He is one of the Greatest Bears of All Time. He won a Super Bowl in 2018 after defeating Tom Brady and Bill Belichick’s team, the New England Patriots.

title: IPL 2026: Amid Sooryavanshi and Arya noise, Prabhsimran Singh is quietly 'raising the bar'
content: Prabhsimran Singh has been part of Punjab Kings, earlier Kings XI Punjab, since 2019, when the IPL franchise splurged Rs 4.8 crore on the youngster. Over the last few seasons, the hard-hitting batter has found consistency, with Ricky Ponting playing a big role in it.

title: Passport row: SC refuses relief to Pawan Khera, declines plea to extend transit bail
content: The Supreme Court denied Congress leader Pawan Khera's request for extended transit anticipatory bail, impacting his efforts to secure protection before an Assam court. This follows the apex court's stay on a Telangana High Court order, raising concerns about "forum shopping" as the FIR originated in Assam. Khera can still seek bail in Assam.

title: Gold enters ‘healthy consolidation phase’ after retail buying surge: Report
content: Gold is experiencing a healthy consolidation after a retail-driven buying spree, particularly in India, China, and the US, according to Jefferies. While demand has cooled, evidenced by a sharp drop in Indian gold imports, the mining sector shows robust fundamentals. Companies are prioritizing shareholder returns over expansion, with strong cash flows expected, suggesting continued sector support.

title: 'Gift wrapped in barbed wire': Tharoor slams Centre for linking women’s quota with Delimitation Bill
content: Senior Congress leader Shashi Tharoor criticized the proposed delimitation exercise as "political demonetisation," arguing that linking women's reservation to constituency redrawing and census data unnecessarily complicates a widely supported reform. He urged immediate implementation of women's reservation, warning that delimitation could disrupt federalism and political power balances.

title: 'False information': Vinod Kambli's wife Andrea Hewitt hits back at health rumours
content: Reports about Vinod Kambli's deteriorating health, including claims of a brain clot affecting his memory, have circulated widely. However, his wife Andrea Hewitt has dismissed these as false, stating he is fine. While Kambli has been seen using a walking stick, his family asserts he is recovering.

title: Jacqueline Fernandez seeks to turn approver in Rs 200 crore Sukesh Chandrashekhar case
content: Bollywood actress Jacqueline Fernandez has filed a plea to become an approver in the Rs 200 crore money-laundering case involving Sukesh Chandrashekhar. The Enforcement Directorate is investigating the alleged extortion racket. Fernandez, who has been questioned previously, has now expressed her willingness to cooperate with the agency by turning approver in the high-profile case.

title: Rohit Shetty house firing: UP STF & Mumbai Police arrest 9th accused in Agra - Report
content: In a significant development, Pradeep Kumar, also known as Gaath, was apprehended in Agra by the Uttar Pradesh STF in collaboration with the Mumbai Police Crime Branch. Kumar has been identified as a pivotal member of the Shubham Lonkar gang, implicated in the shooting incident at filmmaker Rohit Shetty's residence in Mumbai. Read on to know more in detail.

title: How drones deployed from aircraft, helicopters could change aerial warfare
content: India's Air Force is enhancing its offensive capabilities by seeking drones deployable from helicopters and loitering munitions from transport aircraft. These advanced systems, capable of various missions including electronic warfare and target acquisition, aim to free up fighter jets and counter adversaries effectively. Similar initiatives are underway globally, highlighting a significant shift in future warfare strategies.

title: India's longest range electric scooter: Simple Ultra launched with 400 km range!
content: Bengaluru-based Simple Energy has launched the Simple Ultra, India's longest-range electric scooter with a claimed 400 km IDC range. Priced at Rs 2.35 lakh, the scooter boasts a 6.5 kWh battery, a top speed of 115 kmph, and a 0-40 kmph acceleration of 2.77 seconds.

title: Shredded to cosmic dust: Stunning footage captures comet’s death plunge into the Sun — watch
content: Indian space enthusiasts, brace yourselves! Nasa spacecraft have witnessed the dramatic demise of comet C/2026 A1 (MAPS) as it ventured too close to the Sun. Observations from SOHO, STEREO, and PUNCH revealed the icy wanderer disintegrating into a dust cloud, likely hours before its closest solar approach.

title: Army Commander's conference concludes, lessons from ongoing conflicts discussed
content: In a landmark gathering, India's foremost military leaders came together for a three-day Army Commander's Conference dedicated to transforming the armed forces into a cutting-edge 'Future Ready Force'. The agenda was rich with strategic discussions on integrating advanced technologies, achieving robust networking capabilities by 2026, advancing unmanned systems, and extracting valuable insights from current global conflicts.

title: ‘Scripted conspiracy by Bajrang Dal’: Uncle of accused in TCS Nashik case says 'not a major scandal'
content: Two accused in the Tata Consultancy Services Nashik sexual harassment case remain in police custody. An accused relative claims the allegations are part of a conspiracy and scripted. Police have arrested seven employees so far. A Special Investigation Team is probing complaints from eight women. Tata Consultancy Services has a zero-tolerance policy and is investigating the matter.

title: Telangana: 12 lakh people prefer ‘No Caste’ tag in survey, most in Greater Hyderabad
content: Nearly 12 lakh people identified as 'No Caste' in Telangana's SEEEPC survey, representing 3.4% of the population. This group, largely urban and educated, exhibits higher income, employment in professional jobs, and better asset ownership, indicating a detachment from caste's negative consequences.

title: Amaravati sex abuse case: Mastermind teen Ayaan Ahmed casual confession stuns cops
content: Amravati sex abuse and blackmail case mastermind Ayaan Ahmed reportedly told sleuths he became a 'playboy' after his first breakup. Investigations reveal he used earnings from his cellphone business and Instagram promotions to fund a promiscuous lifestyle, luring women online over several months before allegedly coercing them into sexual favors.

title: Niggle behind slump? Jayawardene on Bumrah's struggling form
content: Star pacer Jasprit Bumrah is enduring a rare wicketless streak in IPL 2026, going five matches without success. Despite this, coach Mahela Jayawardene backs his bowler, citing a minor World Cup niggle and a need for luck.  The Mumbai Indians bowling unit, however, admits to lacking penetration this season, contributing to their current ninth-place standing.

title: India’s big nuclear leap: How Stage 2 criticality will power the road to energy security
content: India's nuclear ambitions have reached a pivotal stage with the Prototype Fast Breeder Reactor achieving criticality, marking a significant step in its three-stage nuclear program. This advancement positions India as a leader in advanced nuclear technology, bolstering its drive for energy self-reliance and security amidst a rapidly expanding power sector.

title: Virat Kohli’s instagram 'like' sparks meme storm, fans revive 'Algorithm' joke
content: Virat Kohli's recent Instagram 'like' on a post by influencer LizLaz has sparked a new wave of memes and online discussion. This incident, similar to a past one involving Avneet Kaur, has fans humorously blaming the 'algorithm.' Teammate Yuzvendra Chahal's subsequent comment on the post has also gone viral.

title: Interior design: 5 decor styling tricks that make any home look expensive without renovating
content: Interior experts reveal five budget-friendly hacks to elevate your home's aesthetic without costly renovations. Simple changes like choosing the right paint colours, upgrading lighting, decluttering, layering textures and adding statement pieces sparingly can instantly create a more luxurious feel. Focusing on intentionality and editing rather than adding is key to achieving a high-end look.

title: Supply shortage of gold, silver? Banks stop import orders as metals stuck at customs
content: Typically, the Directorate General of Foreign Trade, operating under the Ministry of Commerce and Industry, issues a notification at the beginning of each financial year specifying the banks authorised by the Reserve Bank of India to import gold and silver.

title: The air you breathe is making you sick earlier than you think, finds UK study
content: A new UK study reveals that air pollution significantly accelerates the onset of chronic diseases, including cardiovascular, respiratory, neurological, digestive, and cancer categories.  Researchers found that higher exposure to particulate matter and nitrogen oxides leads to earlier diagnoses, potentially shaving years off healthy life expectancy. The findings highlight the urgent need for improved air quality to slow disease progression.

title: 'Building castles in air': Iran mocks Trump’s 'will get free oil, free Hormuz' claim
content: Iran's state media has dismissed US President Donald Trump's claims of a negotiation breakthrough as "building castles in the air." Trump stated that Iran is close to a deal and has agreed to hand over its enriched uranium, a key point of contention in the ongoing conflict.

title: 'We don’t want to push': Big Rohit Sharma update from MI head coach
content: Rohit Sharma was rested for Mumbai Indians' IPL 2026 clash against Punjab Kings due to a hamstring injury. Despite his absence, head coach Mahela Jayawardene stated it's not a serious issue and the team's struggles are a collective responsibility. Mumbai Indians suffered their fourth consecutive defeat, falling to ninth place in the standings.

title: Leak on pipeline at Vazhuthacaud plugged, says Kerala Water Authority
content: KWA officials say the contractor for the Smart City projects carried out the repair; the pipeline sprang a leak near the City Police Commissioner’s office around 10 p.m. on April 13

title: Assembly Elections 2026 LIVE: Abhishek Banerjee says BJP supporters abused TMC woman worker
content: Senior TMC leader hopes that the Election Commission will take action against those involved in the "heinous attack on the woman".

title: Govt. wants to change India’s electoral map, Opposition will defeat the Bill, says Rahul
content: Rahul Gandhi says Constitution Amendment Bill is “nothing short of an anti-national act” and said the Opposition is going to defeat the attempt to “attack the nation state”

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election 2026: party manifestos
content: This is a compilation of poll manifestos released by prominent political parties in Tamil Nadu ahead of the State Assembly election scheduled to be held on April 23, 2026

title: Pallichattambi movie review: Heavy-handed approach drags down this ahistorical period movie
content: The film, set amid the tumultuous period of the Liberation Struggle in Kerala, takes a very dated approach in its writing and filmmaking aspects

title: Andhra University journalism department holds Veeksha 2026 photo exhibition for centenary
content: Andhra University’s journalism department holds photo exhibition “Veeksha 2026” marking the university’s centenary with archival and student work

title: More women in the fray, but Tamil Nadu polls remain overwhelmingly male
content: From just 11 women candidates in 1967, accounting for 1.41% of the total number of candidates, the figure has risen to 443 in 2026, making up 11.01% of the contestants. Though the increase is notable, proportionally, women continue to occupy only a small share of the candidate pool

title: Four Maoists killed in Jharkhand’s Hazaribag
content: The encounter took place in the Batuka forest area within the Keredari police station limits, following a tip-off

title: Congress MLA Vinay Kulkarni, 16 others sentenced to life imprisonment for 2016 murder of BJP leader in Dharwad
content: Vinay Kulkarni, elected to the Legislative Assembly from the Dharwad constituency, was named as prime accused in the murder of Yogeshgouda Goudar, a 26-year-old BJP zilla panchayat member, in Dharwad in 2016

title: Living with the Mughals: a legacy that endures despite erasure
content: April 21, 2026 marks five centuries since the decisive Battle of Panipat which led to the founding of the Mughal empire in the Indian subcontinent. Memory, monument and everyday language carry forward a contested inheritance that refuses to fade

title: NHAI to implement live tracking facility for its ambulances, patrol vehicles
content: Sources in the NHAI said that dedicated android mobile phones will be provided to patrol vehicle teams and tablets to ambulance crews

title: Court seeks ED's response on Jacqueline Fernandez's plea to turn approver in money laundering case
content: Ms. Fernandez, who was summoned by the ED several times in connection with the investigation, was named as an accused for the first time in a supplementary charge sheet filed by the agency

title: Income Tax officials search premises linked to aides of Senthilbalaji in Karur
content: There searches are said to be a result of intelligence reports that gifts, meant for distribution to voters, were stored in these places

title: Karnataka man arrested for posing as IAS officer held meeting with officials in Chikkamagaluru, felicitated for ‘clearing UPSC’
content: Among other things, he promised a medicine supply tender to a shop-owner and allegedly demanded a bribe to follow through with the deal

title: Anbumani slams Tamil Nadu CM Stalin over ‘false fear’ on delimitation
content: Dr. Anbumani welcomed assurances given by Prime Minister Narendra Modi and Home Minister Amit Shah that Tamil Nadu’s Lok Sabha constituencies will not be reduced

title: Parliament special sitting LIVE: Opposition will defeat the Bill, Rahul Gandhi says
content: Lok Sabha is expected to vote on the three key Bills today; PM Modi and Amit Shah told the House that the Bills to amend the women’s reservation law and allow delimitation exercise will keep current proportional representation of southern States intact

title: TDP MP Devarayalu backs Women’s Reservation and Delimitation Bills in Lok Sabha debate
content: TDP MP Lavu Sri Krishna Devarayalu supports Women’s Reservation and Delimitation Bills in Lok Sabha, says AP’s share may rise to 4.6%

title: Stalin stands exposed after PM Modi’s assurance on delimitation: Edappadi Palaniswami
content: Pointing out that the share of Tamil Nadu in the Lok Sabha would go up from 7.18% to 7.23%, Mr. Palaniswami, in an interview with The Hindu, said that “this disproves what he [Mr. Stalin] has been saying.”

title: Andhra Pradesh land allotment committee clears 599 proposals worth ₹2037 crore across 19 districts
content: Andhra Pradesh State Land Allotment Committee approved 599 applications worth ₹2,037 crore covering 215.80 acres across 19 districts

title: Blistering heat, soaring UV levels and high humidity keep Kerala on its toes
content: IMD warns of above-average temperatures across State as sweltering, sultry conditions prevail; several places record alarming levels of UV radiation; urban heat island effect amplifies the conditions

title: Man who impersonated IAS officer arrested for ₹41 lakh fraud in Bengaluru
content: According to the complainant, who owns a medical store, the accused was introduced to him through a District Surgeon, and had promised to secure a medicine supply order worth ₹1.8 crore for Primary Health Centres.

title: Tamil Nadu election 2026: How a stool at polling booths makes a huge difference for these people
content: Members of Tamil Nadu Dwarfism Association have reiterated a set a demands they have always made when the hustings is round the corner

title: Manipur CM Yumnam seeks to remove Kuki-Naga trust deficit
content: Yumnam Khemchand Singh insists that dialogue is the only option for the restoration of peace in ethnic conflict-scarred Manipur

title: Delimitation row: BJP vs Congress over Revanth Reddy’s hybrid model
content: The model, put forward by Revanth Reddy, seeks to balance population-based representation with economic performance indicators such as Gross State Domestic Product (GSDP).

title: Turpu Kapu community leaders in Srikakulam unhappy over TDP party posts distribution
content: Srikakulam Turpu Kapu leaders express displeasure over TDP ignoring the community in key party posts ahead of local body polls

title: Ahead of Assembly election results, Congress leadership debate in Kerala heats up
content: In a contentious FB post, K. Sudhakaran backs K.C. Venugopal. While Ramesh Chennithala says party high command will take final call, KPCC president Sunny Joseph points out ‘senior leaders should not jump the gun’ on the matter. Left supporters seek to characterise ‘feuding’ in Congress as a move aimed at testing ‘factional loyalties and flushing out potential rivals’

title: India welcomes Israel-Lebanon ceasefire
content: The truce comes as Washington steps up efforts to reach a deal to end the war with Iran, with Tehran insisting a Lebanon truce must be part of any agreement

title: First batch of 1,75,025 pilgrims will embark on Hajj pilgrimage
content: The Additional Secretary (Gulf) at the MEA said that exactly a total of 1,75,025 pilgrims will be embarking on the Hajj pilgrimage

title: BJP woos Bengal youth with promise of job creation, better sports facilities
content: Senior sportspersons Leander Paes and Vijender Singh promise to make Bengal a centre of excellence to stop the out-migration of youth

title: Two arrested in Kerala over sharing eatery’s Vishu poster depicting Lord Krishna before non-veg dish
content: According to FIR, the accused shared the poster on WhatsApp to allegedly hurt religious sentiments of Hindu community

title: Develop real-time dashboard to map and monitor EV charging infrastructure: Telangana CS
content: Energy Department in the process of framing a policy to mandate the installation of EV charging points in the basements of apartment complexes

title: Fish emerges as a campaign symbol on Bengali New Year
content: The narrative around vegetarian and non-vegetarian dietary preferences has dominated the election campaign; while the ruling Trinamool Congress has dubbed the BJP as a party of “outsiders” that is unfamiliar with the culture and traditions of West Bengal, the saffron party has been trying to counter this image

title: T.N. election 2026: Cases filed in Madras High Court over assets of Vijay, Tamilisai Soundararajan
content: Litigants have sought an inquiry by Director General of Income Tax (Investigation) as it had been sought in another case filed against Deputy Chief Minister Udhayanidhi Stalin

title: Housing for roadside dwellers, traffic solutions are top priorities for Harbour constituency: DMK Minister Sekarbabu
content: Minister P.K. Sekarbabu says 3,000 multi-storey housing units are planned to be built and a multi-level car parking facility being constructed at Broadway will reduce traffic congestion in areas like Sowcarpet. He also seeks to increase the number of educational institutions, learning centres, and libraries and provide uninterrupted electricity, safe drinking water, and proper sewer systems

title: Tipra Motha sweeps Tripura tribal council elections, wins 20 of 28 seats
content: The second consecutive triumph for the party floated in 2020 by the former royal scion, with the demand for a 'Greater Tipraland', showed its dominance among the State's tribal community. The BJP won three seats, while counting in five constituencies is underway, according to the SEC

title: Tea bodies urge PM Modi to allow producers freedom to choose mode of sale
content: Four tea organisations from Assam and West Bengal say mandatory auction rules raise costs and threaten viability of tea producers

title: Income Tax raids rock poll bound West Bengal
content: The raids triggered not only sharp political reactions from the Trinamool Congress but party workers gathered near the sites where the raids were held and raised slogans against the BJP

title: Heat alert in Kerala: Heatstroke clinics opened as Health Minister urges caution over rising temperatures
content: Public urged to avoid direct exposure to sunlight between 11 am and 3 pm as high ultraviolet (UV) levels are being recorded during these hours in Kerala

title: Tamil Nadu election 2026: Spat between Centre and State takes a toll on quality of higher education
content: A total of 16 universities in T.N. continue to suffer without institutional heads, even as the hearing on a bill on giving power to the State Government to appoint V-Cs is on before the High Court

title: Andhra University marks centenary with massive human ‘AU@100’ formation in Vizag
content: Hundreds of students, faculty and staff of Andhra University form a human “AU@100” formation to mark the university’s centenary

title: Supreme Court’s intervention offers fresh hope to excluded electors for West Bengal Assembly polls
content: Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee urged all deleted voters to apply to the tribunals and assured them that they will get their rights reinstated; she said a supplementary list for the first phase of elections will be published on 21st April and the second phase on April 27, as per the Supreme Court order

title: West Bengal SIR: Voters cleared by tribunals by April 21 or 27 will be able to vote in Assembly polls, says Supreme Court
content: The order by a Bench headed by Chief Justice of India Surya Kant spelt a huge reprieve for citizens whose right to vote was denied in the SIR under the “logical discrepancy” category

title: ‘Fascist BJP regime against Tamil, Tamil Nadu and its rights,’ says Udhayanidhi
content: Udhayanidhi Stalin says there is a threat to the Tamil language, Tamil Nadu and its Rights by the fascist BJP regime; this Assembly election was to protect our rights and the people of Madurai know this

title: Actor Allu Arjun moves Delhi High Court for protection of personality rights
content: Counsel refers to 'fake-call Pushpa' app; Justice Tushar Rao Gedela indicates that the court would pass an interim order in the Telugu actor’ favour

title: Kerala BDS student death: Two accused faculty members move court for anticipatory bail
content: Dr. M.K. Ram and Dr. Sangeeta Nambiar, who remain absconding, contend in their bail plea that they had no role in Nithin Raj’s death and argue that the student was under stress due to threats from a loan app

title: Six persons, including three women from single family, burnt alive in road accident near Shorapur in Yadgir district of Karnataka

title: '24 Hours Without Food, Water': Indian Woman In US For 35 Years Detained By ICE
content: Batra had moved to the US in 1991 as a child after her parents were killed in the anti-Sikh violence of 1984. She has spent almost all of her adult life in South Texas, raising her four children. Her son recently enlisted in the US Army.

content: Investigations revealed that the accused, Ushaben, harboured a deep-seated resentment against the Donda family. Eight months ago, Ushaben's daughter had eloped to enter a love marriage.

title: After AAP's Ashok Mittal, Probe Agency Raids Punjab Minister Sanjeev Arora's Premises
content: On Thursday, the ED had also raided the premises of Ashok Mittal, the AAP's Deputy Leader in the Rajya Sabha. With the latest action against Sanjeev Arora, political tensions between the AAP and the BJP have further intensified.

title: Houthi Threat? Why USS George Bush Is Taking 1.5 Times Longer Route To Gulf

title: Delimitation explained: Since 1951, Hindi belt’s Lok Sabha share has fallen more than South's
content: between 1951 and 1977, both the Hindi belt and the southern states saw their share of Lok Sabha seats decline . the main reason was not a gain for the South over the North . but the growing representation of Union Territories and the rising share of western and eastern states .
